MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Peter Chan (Petitioner/Trustee). Trent Thornley for Rita Guzman (Petitioner).

Mr. Der requested a continuance stating that the Mediator was not available until June 19th and that they were scheduled for that date. All underlying petitions on calendar for June 19, 2009 and status on mediation were continued to Friday July 10, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status and for trial setting.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To Confirm Exemption Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-20-2009 Continued To Jun-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Application For Order Requesting Continuance Of Evidentiary Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Accounting.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Continued To Mar-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Peter Chan (Objector). Trent Thornley for Rita Guzman (Petitioner).

Mr. Thornley stated that the issue was with Mr. Chan not providing an accounting on the Exemption Trust and stated that he wanted to have Lily Tam (independent trustee) appointed as she was already the trustee of the surviving trust. Mr. Der stated that Lily Tam had been selected by Rita Guzman, that he had an appointment with his Client today to go over all the documents, that there may be alot of gaps in the accounting and that he did know how Lily Tam was appearing as Trustee on the exemption trust bank statements. The Parties did not agree on mediation. The Court set the matter for trial on the issue regarding the removal of Peter Chan as Trustee for March 20, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Der is to make all documents available to Mr. Thornley for copying by February 18, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Continued To Mar-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Accounting.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Continued To Feb-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Continued To Feb-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Continued To Jan-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trent Thornley for Margarita Guzman (Petitioner). Ernest Der for Peter Chan (Objector).

The parties presented argument to support their positions. The Court stated that it would reserve the removal issue until the accounting is completed. The Court continued the matter to January 21, 2009 for status on the filing of the accounting. Mr. Thornley expressed concerns regarding the distributions. Mr. Der stated that nothing was being distributed since his client's name was removed from the bank accounts by Mrs. Chan. The Court ordered no distributions. Mr. Thornley noted that the Survivor's Trust was under the control of Ms. Tam, and requested a list of the accounts. Mr. Der stated he would ask his client for a list of the accounts, and then he would provide Mr. Thornley with a copy.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
